function.rulebook_notes: Completed identity bootstrap; read required system and finance rulebooks before task work; used exact and broadened search then validated by reading the matching invoice record.
function.outcome_justification: The only matching invoice line item on or after 2026-03-01 appears in the read invoice issued_on 2026-03-26 and its line_eur is 240, so total revenue for that service line since the beginning of March 2026 is 240.
